summary:
SPIRITUAL HUMILITY AND DEFLECTING GLORY: Brandon shares that the Lord instructed him about the importance of humility, referencing William Seymour who placed a physical box over his head to humble himself before meetings. Brandon explains that believers must find their own metaphorical box, which represents dying to self and deflecting all glory to God during the upcoming global spiritual outpouring. Brandon highlights Kathryn Kuhlman as another example of a spiritual vessel who constantly directed all glory back to the Lord, emphasizing that individuals must view themselves merely as janitors to sustain the great harvest.

GEOPOLITICAL VISIONS AND MILITARY CONFLICTS: Brandon discusses geopolitical prophecies involving the United States, Venezuela, China, and Taiwan. Brandon recalls visions regarding an attack on Venezuela focused on securing oil wells, the establishment of a US military base, and a proxy government. Brandon connects these events to political figures and alliances like BRICS, noting that China had meetings in Venezuela just hours before a US strike. Furthermore, Brandon prophesies that global distractions will allow China to take Taiwan in three days and Russia to fully overtake Ukraine, while warning of internal US political theater, stalemates, and the necessity of a specific political wave for future stability.

OVERCOMING BITTERNESS AND PERSONAL CLEANSING: Brandon relays a message from the Holy Spirit urging people to release deep-seated grudges and forgive those who have wronged them. Brandon states that harboring bitterness, such as resentment from infidelity, abusive relationships, or childhood bullying, creates a demonic attachment that manifests physically and blocks spiritual growth. Brandon emphasizes that believers cannot carry this excess emotional baggage into the future and must surrender their trauma at the altar to experience a higher level of prayer and divine presence.

SEISMIC EVENTS AND ARCHAEOLOGICAL DISCOVERIES: Brandon details a prophetic vision of a massive volcanic eruption and significant seismic activity occurring near the coast of Italy, drawing historical parallels to Pompeii. Brandon explains that these earthquakes will trigger landslides that uncover ancient archaeological discoveries, including mosaics, Greek manuscripts, and biblical artifacts that have been preserved in the earth for centuries. Brandon expands this vision to include significant archaeological finds in Israel and Egypt, specifically mentioning golden tablets, ancient scrolls, and lost historical cures that will validate the biblical narrative.

THE GLOBAL IMPACT OF ARTIFACTS ON RELIGIOUS SYSTEMS: Brandon prophesies that the uncovering of these ancient artifacts will create a spiritual and cultural shockwave, specifically impacting Mecca and the broader Middle East. Brandon states that the findings will challenge Islamic doctrines concerning the Mahdi and Muhammad, prompting some factions to attempt to destroy the evidence. Brandon describes the United States military providing security for these discoveries, which are intended to definitively prove the God of Abraham, Isaac, and Jacob to the world, ultimately leading to widespread repentance and the drawing of both Jews and Gentiles to the faith.
rawData: [January 04, 2026]-[New archeological discoveries that will shake the world are coming]-[https://youtu.be/EmhmXkiAJH0]-[Praise the Lord. Let's start. We waited for a little bit for you all to come on before I start talking, but thank you for joining us. Good morning, family. Good evening, wherever you are all around the world. Thank you for joining us again today; we really appreciate it. We're going to pray, and we'll just go tubing tonight and talk about some of the things that we're seeing in the news. I'll go over some of the things the Lord said to me today when I was driving around. He talked to me about William Seymour and the box that he used to place on his head before every single meeting. He would sit in the corner of the room with the box on his head for sometimes up to an hour, sometimes less, depending on how long the Lord told him to do it. The Lord said to me, 'Brandon, my people must find their box. You must find your box.' What is your box? That's what he started talking to me about. I said, 'Well, what do you mean?' He said, 'I will not share my glory with anybody for what's about to take place in this last outpouring. I will not share my glory with anybody.' William Seymour, before the service would start and the glory would start, would find that place of death to himself: humility, humbling yourself underneath the mighty hand of the Lord. So he started talking to me about putting the box on. He said, 'Brandon, I'm not going to tell you what the box is for you; you'll have to figure it out yourself.' But a box is not just lip service, telling people that it is not you concerning the glory; it's a heart thing. He said, 'I'm looking at the heart—not just what words say.' There are so many preachers, he said, who get on the stage and say, 'We give you all the glory, we give you all the honor, and we give you all the praise,' but their heart is all about themselves and they don't have the box on their head. He said, 'The bigger the box, the more freedom I will give you. The larger the box, it's like being in a refrigerator box. You have a lot more room to move around in there; there's a lot more space to do things. But the smaller the box, the less the trust, as you must always deflect to give him the glory for what's about to take place.' He talked to me about Sister Kuhlman, Kathryn Kuhlman, and how she would always give him the glory, but it was always from the heart. The moment people started to try to uplift her or tell her how great she was, she would recluse because she realized the source of the power and the source of the glory was him. As long as the glory is manifesting through you, you're a container, you're a vessel. He's moving through you, but it's always to deflect to him. The box represents dying to self. The Apostle Paul said, 'I die daily.' The Lord started saying that to die daily is a place of humility. It's not something that you have to convince yourself of. No, you die daily. The more I use you and the greater the glory on your life, the more you have to find the box to deflect. The more you're accurate and the more things come to pass in the days ahead, you're always to deflect. I always go back to it—and I do it for myself because it's really true—I'm just the janitor, which I was just a couple of years ago. No matter if the president, a senator, or the head of whatever country is watching your channel and they get their information and use it, it's not mine; it's the Lord's. The Lord was really telling me what's about to take place in the days ahead with the church. He said, 'You're about to see something that you've never seen before, and there's nothing to compare it to. You're about to see something that you've always longed for, what the elders always longed for, but there's really nothing to compare it to. For I'm going to do something unusual, son. It will be something that we've never seen, and I'm not a cookie-cutter.' There are so many times we come on here and take communion and have a pattern, and I tell you things that the Lord is showing us, but the Holy Spirit has free reign to do whatever he wants to do. He used a word that I didn't even know the meaning of. What was the word? Status quo? No, no, no. Ask your mother. He used a word and said, 'Don't ever do this.' I said, 'What does that even mean?' So Diana had to look it up. As we were being instructed by the Holy Spirit today, I thought, 'What's your box?' Anomaly. Don't become an anomaly. There are so many people that have become an anomaly. I didn't even know what an anomaly was, but whenever he uses big words like that, it goes with everything he's been saying. But I want you to know we must find the box. The greater the glory and the greater the platform, the greater the death. He said that the light afflictions bring forth the greater glory. This refining—we have this treasure in earthen vessels so that the excellency of the power is known of him and not of us. It's more than you'll ever know—that to sustain what God has called us to do in these last days is to continually give him the glory for what he's doing. Regardless, because of insecurity and because people deal with flesh—our flesh likes praise just like the devil; he wanted praise in heaven. He said, 'I'll exalt myself above the Lord,' and boy, did he sure mess up. But our flesh always cries out for more because maybe you were the kid the bully in the schoolyard was always picking on or the last pick at sports. It's always nice for somebody to say, 'Well done, you did a good job.' But the Lord was showing me that for what is coming, there are so many of you who watch this channel and are excited about this end-time outpouring. I have this revival behind me right now because one of the greatest moves of God this world has ever seen is about to hit from shore to shore, all around this world. He'll choose individual people—the new Davids, the new Esthers, and the new leaders of this generation—to take the baton and run and bring in the greatest harvest. But the Lord told me, 'I want you to tell my people: find your box like William Seymour.' It doesn't have to be a physical box, but what's your box? William Seymour's was a real box, and he put that crate on his head. But he said, 'What's your box?' It's the place of surrender, the place of death, the place to humble yourself underneath the mighty hand of the Lord. We have the treasure in earthen vessels so that the excellency of the power will be known of him. He will not share his glory with any of us. Regardless of how amazing things are with the words and things that happen in the days ahead, I always want you to know that Brandon Biggs is just a servant of the Most High God, just like you are. It's so important that you stay the janitor in your eyes. Don't lose sight of yourself. The Lord always says to stay grounded. Keep your feet on the ground. Remember, even today, put your feet on the ground. I was driving and I said, 'What does that mean?' Ground yourself. Look inside. Go deep within. This is nothing compared to what I want to do in the days ahead with you. This is nothing compared to what I want to do with me and each one of these individuals that are here praying with you. There are so many souls that are about to come into the kingdom of God, and there's so much arrogance and so much pride behind the pulpits. The Lord said, 'Brandon, I'm going to humble the church. There's going to be a cleansing. There's going to be a 1 Corinthians 5:5 moment. You're going to see these things in the days ahead.' And the young Davids, the new voices that I have for this hour will rise up and they will take the baton from the elders. There'll be new Esthers. There'll be these new voices that seemingly came out of nowhere. He said, 'I will use them greatly in the days ahead.' But you've not even entered into the second phase of what I've called you to do yet. Signs and wonders will follow them that believe. He said, 'I don't want you to do videos so much until I tell you to. I want you to be more strategic in the way you do things in prayer. Do it this way and do it exactly.' He's given me great instruction for us to pray together and how we are supposed to function as an army. As we flow in the army, as we flow with the anointing of the Holy Ghost, we will have great results. With great power comes great responsibility. They stole that from the Lord, I guarantee you. I always want to tell you all this because it's very important that you understand he is a good God and he loves you, but he'll not share his glory with anybody. Many of you have major calls on your life, and it's so interesting because so many of you email saying, 'I had this vision' or 'I had this dream.' You have so much potential, but you're not dead to yourself. There's so much ego and so much stuff going on. I said, 'Find the janitor.' No matter how much you feel that you should have a platform or wonder why God is not using you yet, find the place of death. Find the janitor. You might say, 'I'm a cleaner now, I do this and that,' but the Lord said, 'Find the janitor and die there to yourself.' I don't know how else to describe that to you; you have to figure it out yourself. The more you squirm, it's like someone who lays a sacrifice on the altar to the Father. My life is for His. You're up there and He's looking to see if you're dead. You say, 'I'm dead,' but the Lord looks and says, 'No, you're not dead yet.' You keep saying, 'I'm dead,' but you're just looking around like a kid playing. When you're truly dead, you'll know it. There's no pretending. Dead is dead, and the flesh starts to stink. You'll know it. It's a place of surrender. It's a place of saying, 'Father, I'm not going to complain about what you have for me anymore, no matter if this whole thing goes away tomorrow.' Between all the invitations I get to preach from all around the globe—some in Australia and South America—the Australian one was tempting because it would be fun to go way down under and see what's down there. But I won't do it until the Lord says. It's interesting because I told Diana that the more everything takes place, the more I just want to be reclusive. Change happens so quickly for all of us. The Lord will put his finger on you, and the moment he does, he says, 'Brandon, I don't want anyone to get the glory for what I'm about to do in your life. There's no platform that will ever be given to you. It'll all be by my hand. The money I bless you with, the notoriety, everything will come from me. Just bring in my harvest.' All that to say this: Braden has some of these clips and he'll show you this, and we'll go right into tubing. That's really what He's been talking to me about the last couple of days. He gave me a scripture. I was watching Sister Kuhlman and she said her main thing with the Lord is Psalm 17:8: 'Keep me as the apple of thy eye. Hide me under the shadow of thy wings.' Her description of that in this sermon—and we can put the link below—is amazing. Braden, I'll send this to you so you can show them this sermon. I would encourage everybody to listen to it. This guy has a YouTube channel with 3,000 subscribers. Diana found it. Someone left him an attic full of Mrs. Kuhlman's tapes, reel-to-reels, and old stuff that has never been public. There are recordings of someone in the audience in Ohio recording her. He's bringing forth all this lost material, and these archives are life-changing. He has hundreds of boxes from a fan of Kathryn Kuhlman who just stored it in the attic. Diana and I feel like we're at a buffet. I'm going to give this to you. I don't even think he knows who I am, but I watch his channel. It's not about him; it's about Katherine. I'll give you one sermon that is amazing; the scripture is 'The secret to success is loving Him.' This is how I keep myself full. I'm a scavenger; I pick the bone until there's nothing left. I told Diana we do this every year. Do you have that for them? Can you put it on there so they can see it? I want them to grasp it because this will change your life if you listen. People ask me about these books; there it is: Oral Roberts, 1972. Isn't that awesome? Kenneth Hagin books. Things that will change your life. I don't know what his channel's name is. Kathryn Kuhlman Radio, no AI, because there's so many people trying to make fake AI sermons. And this is all her original archives of stuff that this guy stored up, so it will bless you. It's trying to help. If you want to listen to it, fine; if you don't, fine. But there you go. When Diana found this, I went, "Oh my goodness, this blessed me so." I'll play a second of it so they can hear it. I'll be right back. I dare say that practically every young person who is graduating today—every one of you young people who are wearing a cap and a gown—has come from a Christian home. If you've not come from a Christian home, you've had the finest Christian training here at Oral Roberts University. You know doctrine, you know your Bible. And for me to stand up here and preach a message, for me to give you doctrine, would be so foolish, for nothing that I could say to you would be something you have not already heard and known. I just want to take the lid off of my heart for a few minutes. Two weeks ago, I was in a music hall in Kansas City, Missouri, and I got up early one morning and I drove 60 miles out of Kansas City to Concordia, Missouri, where I was born. And I did something: I went back to that little Methodist church, and I was so shocked that it got so small in such a short time. When I was young, it looked so big. When I went back two weeks ago, the same pews were there. They were just as shiny as the Sunday morning when I was 14 years of age and received that wonderful spiritual experience of being born again. Walking into the vestibule, the rope was still there. A little tiny Methodist church, not seating any more than a hundred people—you could maybe squeeze 125 people in the church. Walking into that little vestibule, there was the rope that always rang the bell when somebody died in Concordia. If it was a young person, they tolled it once. When it was a middle-aged person, they would toll the bell twice. If it was an elderly person, they would toll it three times. And then everybody ran to the telephone and asked the one telephone operator who died. And the bell was still there and the rope was still there that had tolled for so many people. And I walked in and I sat in the corner of the same pew, the third row from the front. I sat in that same corner of that pew that I sat that Sunday morning when I was only 14 years of age. It was the very first time that I had ever felt the power of the Holy Spirit. And I didn't recognize the power of the Holy Spirit—believe me, I knew nothing about the Holy Spirit. I knew nothing whatsoever about the third person of the Trinity. Nothing. I don't even remember who the preacher was; I don't remember one thing that he said. I've never seen anyone accept Christ as their Savior in that Methodist church. I'm not sure that anyone was converted before or since. I'm not sure. But suddenly, as they were singing the last hymn and I had the Methodist hymnal in my hand, I began to shake. It was years later that I recognized it as the power of the Holy Spirit, and I began to shake so much that I laid the hymnal down and then I knew that I had to do something. I did the only thing that I knew to do: I slipped out from that pew and sat down on the front row, on the front pew. And nobody knew what to do with me. The preacher didn't know, and I cried. What a joy. One of the old sisters came to me and said, "Oh, Kathryn, don't cry." I didn't have a hanky, I remember that, and my tears were running, my nose was running. And she gave me a handkerchief and she said, "Oh, Kathryn, you've been such a good girl all your life, don't cry." And both of us knew she was lying, because those things didn't happen in Concordia; I made them happen. That marvelous experience of being born again, that glorious experience. So help me, there's never been a moment since that experience—that Sunday morning in that little Methodist church in that front pew when I was born again—there's never been a split second that I've ever doubted my salvation. And sitting there two weeks ago in that same pew, I relived many things. I remember as a little girl standing there, and the only time Papa ever went to church—he would never go to church; my Papa hated preachers. If he saw the preacher coming down the street, and if he saw the preacher before the preacher saw him, the preacher never saw him. He went to church only at Christmas time when his girl would give a recitation on Children's Day when she sang a song. They always said that Kathryn was the apple of her Papa's eye. I've heard that ever since I was a little girl: "You know, Kathryn, that mean little girl with the freckled face and the red hair is the apple of her Papa's eye." And I knew it, and it was my security. I knew it. And every time I got up to give that recitation, I saw only one person in that little church, and that was Papa. And I did my best for Papa; I was the apple of his eye. And sitting there two weeks ago in that same pew, three rows from the front, where the Holy Spirit first spoke to my heart, I sat there in silence and it seemed like all the years of my life came before me. There were the turkey houses where I slept when I first started out. I slept in a straw stack once. I lived on butter horns for a week—that was all I could afford. There have been deep waters, very deep waters. The sun hasn't always shone. And I sat there and I thought, "What through all of these years really has been the motivating force in this life of mine?" I wasn't made to do what I've done all my life. There wasn't enough money in the whole world to pay me for the long hours and the sleepless nights. Believe me, I tell you the truth, there's not enough money in the world to pay me for the way I've worked in my lifetime. Nobody forced me to do it. It wasn't because of doctrine; it wasn't because I was afraid of God. I didn't do it because I feared God—I'm not that kind of a person. I'm just not that kind of a person. I didn't do it because somebody told me to do it. I've had one verse of scripture that I've wept over; I've held it closely to me, and it's been the motivating force of my life. I read it to you: "Keep me as the apple of the eye; hide me under thy wings." A million times I've held this precious word to my heart. I knew the security that there was in being the apple of Papa's eye. I never feared his wrath. Papa never laid a hand on me. Never. Not that I didn't need it, but he didn't do it. My Papa never laid a hand on me. All Papa had to do was just look at me a certain way—that's all. He would get just a certain look on his face, and I knew it was a look of disapproval. And I loved him so much. I was the apple of his eye, and I wasn't going to let him down. A million times, methinks, I've held this close to my heart and I said, "Wonderful Jesus, more than anything else in the whole world, I want to be the apple of your eye." I have but one ambition in life—just one, only one. I live for one thing and one thing only—just one thing. Just one thing I desire, but one thing above everything else in the world: to be the apple of your eye. I want your smile. It's beautiful. It blesses me so. I think I've listened to that, I can't tell you how many times, going over and over and just thinking about what she's saying. And you look at somebody who walked with Him the way she did in a modern age, you know, and that's why my friend Billy Burke was mentored by her, and thank God he's been a friend to me, because it's cross-pollination. There's so much about cross-pollination. You can feel it; it changes you. And I know it's all the Holy Spirit, and He changes you from the inside out by the Word of God. But there is a lot about cross-pollination when you get around people that have been around it, the presence changes you. You get around people. It's like, who are you hanging around? I used to see all the time, "Who are you hanging around?" I'll tell you where you'll be in the next couple of years by who you're hanging around, what books you're reading, what you're watching on TV, and what you're meditating on. You must come up higher in your walk with the Father in 2026. But I bring all this to you because it's what has helped me, and so people are always asking. So, I just try to put you in the direction of... and I had somebody email me and said, "Brandon, you can't talk about finances. You shouldn't do that." Listen, I tell you what I hear. I'm not a financial adviser. I'm not trying to manipulate markets. Whatever you think you are saying to me, I see these things. And I tell you, you take it to God in prayer. If you don't feel like it's the Lord, then you say, "Brandon, I feel like you're off." And you know what? Guess what? I could be. I'm just as human as every single one of you. Can I miss it? Yes. Am I perfect? No, not by a long shot. But whenever I bring it to you, it's just something that was dear to my heart that I've been praying over about Don Jr. here and Eric Trump and all the Trump family, and the Lord said, "I'm going to multiply their wealth times three." So, you can do with what you want, but it's not for you to take and invest your hard-earned money into something whenever you haven't prayed about it yourself. How foolish are you to do that? I'm not trying to tell you to do that; I ask you to pray with it. Help me. But it's all in my opinion and it's never financial advice. But there are so many people asking about what you said about the Prince of Persia and about Babylon and the dinar rising and all the things. It's biblical. It's in the word. I'm not trying to tell you what to do with your finances. That would be the last person to listen to about that. I don't have a degree in that. I just follow the voice of the Lord as closely as I know how. And I'm just as human as anybody else. So, take it for what you want, pray about it. Let's pray together and see what the Lord wants us to do here. When I was with you all this morning, I saw to pray over the churches, mega-churches, movie theaters, major gatherings of all kinds, praying over this Red Dawn experience that the Lord keeps talking to us about, praying over D-Day as we have attacked Venezuela today and all the things the Lord showed us. I thought it was interesting because President Trump said that he put so many troops on the ground. Was that to secure the oil wells? There's a lot more to this that the Lord shows me, but I told you I saw all the oil wells catching fire and there was a retaliation against the United States of America in the days ahead because of the oil. Now, I want to play this little clip for you—just this one little clip of what President Trump said out of his mouth to confirm what the Holy Spirit told us about why they went in and attacked Venezuela in the first place. I said, "You think it's about just drugs? 10% is about cocaine. This other is about right here." I want you to see this. This was said today: "You know, they stole our oil. We built that whole industry there and they just took it over like we were nothing. And we had a president that decided not to do anything about it. They were pumping almost nothing by comparison to what they could have been pumping and what could have taken place. We're going to have our very large United States oil companies, the biggest anywhere in the world, go in, spend billions of dollars, fix the badly broken infrastructure, the oil infrastructure, and start making money for the country. We must put a kink in the hose." So, he already said what the Holy Spirit told us was going to happen to us about the war. And I saw the United States of America building a major military base in Venezuela, and they would occupy Venezuela in the days ahead. And I saw us setting up a proxy government. The United States would govern over this. And I saw it turning red, which I thought was interesting. And then the Lord showed me that great revival would break forth in Venezuela and that they would bring forth economy and stability and things like that. Well, this is exactly what we tried to do to Iraq, but that failed miserably, didn't it? Let's see how this goes. I think it's interesting because the Lord said he would be like a Gaddafi, like a Saddam Hussein, and he would be removed. Now, I know each one of those men came to their death. Will this man? I don't know. I think it could be a type and shadow, a metaphor of what the Lord was showing me—that these people were moved out of being head over their nations and then all of a sudden people were brought in and are taking things over differently. Now, Maliki and the things that happened in Iraq... I don't know who's running Iraq right now. We're praying for that nation to rise up again, but even with this, look how it's all similar to what the Lord showed us. So, President Trump said he's going to bring in oil companies and stuff, but I thought it was interesting that yesterday on the second, China had a meeting in Venezuela. China did, and was talking about oil and things like that. And I thought, "Well, we must have pushed a button because I said it had to do with BRICS." The Lord, not I, the Lord said it had to do with BRICS." And so then I saw Taiwan, and remember I saw a gold dome over it and it was a prayer. But I saw when America was preoccupied that Taiwan would fall in three days, and I saw China take Taiwan. I saw Russia take all of Ukraine eventually. China was there three hours before the US strikes. They probably were still sleeping there. What happened? I wonder if they stayed the night and were in their hotel room going, "What's going on outside?" Three hours before US strikes, China had a meeting in there with him. And then we invaded. So let's see what happens because I believe a lot of political theater will come out of this. I heard "impeach, impeach, impeach." I heard that again. I heard a lot of uprising. People were upset in 2026, concern going clear up into... trying to be a great distraction for midterms. And the Lord said you must vote. You must pray now for midterms. You cannot wait until November or October to start praying for this because the Lord warned us and he said that there would be another blue wave if we didn't. I saw that we would lose the Senate and it would become a stalemate government, that nothing would get done in the days ahead. And we needed a red wave, a major red wave, a major move because of all the things that are about to take place in this nation 2026, 2027, 2028 praying into this. So, I don't know. Do you have any more articles you want to show before we start praying, Bee? No, not really. I mean, you can see some of this; people are excited about him being removed. Next. Yeah. I'm wondering about this one, but it was on Benny Johnson. On Benny Johnson. Yeah. That, and then there's these people. I don't know if this is the ad, but the people play that. Venezuela. Gracias. Gracias. Oh yeah. It blasts me. You know, there's so much AI and stuff nowadays, so you don't know what's real and what's not. So you have to really watch it and be careful. But there's stuff that I go 'ah,' you know. So we'll continue to pray. Let's take communion and do this. How long was that? An hour. Wait. 55 minutes. So not too bad. I brought you that video so you could know just the direction of what we're going this year. Just keeping the apple of his eye, all this stuff and what the Lord has called us to do. We're so thankful that he would even look our direction. Father, we just thank you for the body. Is there any more videos? No, that's it. Father, we just thank you for the body. We thank you, Lord, for all that you've done for us and all that you're going to do. Thank you, Father, that by your stripes we are healed. Thank you, Lord, that no weapon formed against us will prosper. We thank you, Lord, for Venezuela. And we thank you, Father, that there's a revival that's about to break forth in them and in Iran. That you're liberating Iranians. Father, that you're going to get rid of the Ayatollah Khamenei. Father, I thank you, Lord, that you'll get rid of Kim Jong-un and his sister. That there'll be a shaking in these nations, Father. Father, that we will see the greatest move of God we've ever seen before and that North Korea will be saved, that China will be saved, and Father, that we will have a major move of God in Taiwan and in all Europe, South America, Africa, South Africa, Nigeria. Father, I thank you Lord for Guatemala and Chile, and Father, we thank you Lord Brazil is already starting to see something. We thank you Lord for the greatest move that we've ever seen before, Father, for you're taking the caps off the wells. You're taking the caps off of the wells, Father. And I thank you, Lord, that we're going to swim down to the bottom. And Father, we lift up this body in the name of Jesus. And we thank you, Lord, that we're healed and whole and well in the name of Jesus by your stripes. And Father, I thank you, Lord, that healing belongs to us. It's part of our redemptive right that Jesus paid the price for us to walk in victory over sickness and disease. Thank you, Lord. Just as much as we are saved, by his stripes, we're healed.
